## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Jason and Edin to discuss ongoing projects, particularly the Surge website and marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge website development is progressing, with homepage preview expected by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [GrowthX site is live; focus now shifts to Surge as the priority](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Jason is assembling a marketing team for Surge, covering content, events, and partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [New design and development resources have been added to Edin's team](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Future projects include a prompt repository and a self-serve AI monitoring product](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)

## Topics

### Surge Website Development

  - [Homepage preview expected by Wednesday for the 6 PM meeting](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Entire site preview anticipated by end of week, though not fully finished](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Sanity CMS to be implemented for blog and research sections](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Blog migration to Sanity may take 2-3 extra days](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Initial focus on rich text in Sanity, with custom components as a future enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Main collections needed: authors, links, and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

### Surge Marketing Strategy

  - [Jason is assembling a full marketing team for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Key areas: messaging, website, content production, and amplification](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Main goal is awareness and differentiation from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Staffing needs: content writer, marketer for partnerships, and external-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Events person already on board (Claudia)](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### GrowthX Website

  - [Site is now live](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Some minor fixes needed (e.g., hiding X's, updating quotes on company page)](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Logo replacements required (Udemy instead of Rapid, Engine instead of Firework)](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Two new team members: one developer and one designer](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Developer completed output set for AL and growth](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
  - [Designer working on a graphic system with potential for automation](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Future Projects

  - [Prompt repository being considered](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Self-serve AI monitoring product (competitor to Profound)](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [Positioning as a G2 or Crunchbase-like platform for AI performance ranking](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Edin to focus on Surge website, aiming for homepage preview by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Jason to provide updates on Surge website progress by Tuesday and before Wednesday's call](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Edin to investigate and fix image loading issues on GrowthX site](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Jason to discuss overall theme and direction with Will and Rafid for community content](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
  - [Edin to send information about the third co-founder (strategist/paid media manager) to Jason](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [Jason to continue assembling the marketing team for Surge](https://fathom.video/share/MY5JvrU8QGXxrM2cXTaqTrshYtZtFYbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
